date_handling.date_string_timezone: PST midnight in Gmail API search
date_handling.note: Use absolute dates or Unix seconds when timezone accuracy matters.

api_ui_differences: Gmail UI alias expansion is not guaranteed in Gmail API responses.
Gmail API does not perform thread-wide searches in the same way the Gmail UI can.

unsafe_patterns.guard: Ask for a narrower query or cap max_results.
Search metadata first, then fetch only selected message or thread IDs.
